scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --names "backend,frontend" "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: pip install -r requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:win: pip install -r requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
